name: claude-telegram
description: Control Claude Code from Telegram. One file, no npm dependencies.

scripts.start: pm2 delete claude-bot-dev 2>/dev/null; pm2 delete claude-bot 2>/dev/null; pm2 start ecosystem.config.js && pm2 save
scripts.dev: pm2 delete claude-bot 2>/dev/null; pm2 delete claude-bot-dev 2>/dev/null; pm2 start ecosystem.dev.config.js && pm2 logs claude-bot-dev
scripts.stop: pm2 delete claude-bot claude-bot-dev 2>/dev/null; echo stopped
